creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2009-01-09 14:12:19 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-List-Uniq   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  List::Uniq extracts the unique elements of a list.
  This is a commonly re-written (or at least re-looked-up)
  idiom in Perl programs.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/List-Uniq/
  
  PR:             ports/130322
  Submitted by:   Murilo Opsfelder <mopsfelder at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3310    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/devel/p5-List-Uniq/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-List-Uniq/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-List-Uniq/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/p5-List-Uniq/pkg-plist (new)
